items.description: Dark ink numerals '15' at the upper right edge.
items.scholarly_note: Early modern foliation mark; project identifies the leaf as page 24.

items.description: Prominent '24' with long curved tail and flourish.
items.scholarly_note: Later reference mark, possibly stanza or leaf reference.

items.description: Column of small letters and marks including repeated 'a.', 'v.', 'o', 'a.', 'v.' aligned to text lines.
items.scholarly_note: Post-medieval annotations, likely for stanza indexing, variant noting, or cross-referencing.

items.description: Ornate looped 'O'- or 'G'-like symbol with horizontal stroke or cross.
items.scholarly_note: Possible nota mark or pen trial.

items.description: Minor overwriting and letter-form adjustments visible in several words (e.g., 'hvaða' area and nearby terms).
items.scholarly_note: Scribal correction or later emendation; ink density varies from main hand.

items.description: Large irregular loss of parchment; triangular tear removing portions of final lines. Edge ragged and frayed.
items.scholarly_note: Severe handling or binding damage typical of the codex.

items.description: Heavy abrasion, creasing, and ink loss; bottom lines blurred and partially illegible.
items.scholarly_note: Wear from repeated opening and turning of the leaf.

items.description: Irregular brownish age and moisture stains across much of the lower parchment.
Localized dark smudge or ink transfer stain adjacent to the large 'S' initial.

items.region: parchment surface, margins and text areas
items.description: Multiple fine surface scratches and abrasions; some cause localized ink flaking and fiber loss.
items.scholarly_note: Combination of original skin preparation marks and later handling.

scratches: Fine linear abrasions across right margin and blank areas.
Surface scratches causing ink flaking in lower text lines.
Small irregular marks consistent with handling abrasion.
damage_notes: Substantial parchment loss at bottom-right corner truncating multiple text lines.
Bottom edge heavily worn with creasing, small tears, and fiber loss.
Lower text heavily abraded with partial erasure and illegibility.
General edge wear and creasing on all sides, most acute at foot and fore-edge.
summary: Folio 24 contains post-medieval marginalia (foliation '15', large '24' mark, vertical column of single-letter annotations), minor scribal or later corrections, and a looped pen trial/notation symbol. Physical condition shows significant damage: large tear and loss at lower right corner, heavy lower abrasion and staining, scattered age stains, and fine surface scratches. No prominent doodles observed.
